scope_note: QA Failure Density Enumeration Cert family [263]: first sharp-claim cert derived from the Kochenderfer 2026 'Algorithms for Validation' bridge (Kochenderfer, 2026). Anchors cert [194] cognition-space morphospace ratios |reachable_set|/|S_9| in {1/81, 8/81, 72/81} (Sole, 2026) in Kochenderfer Ch.7 vocabulary as exact p_fail = E[1{tau not in psi}] enumeration over the finite mod-9 orbit graph; adds a head-to-head sampling comparison gate at N in {100, 1000, 10000} showing empirical estimator variance scales as p(1-p)/N (Kochenderfer eq. 7.3) while QA enumeration variance is identically zero. Utility factored to tools/qa_kg/orbit_failure_enumeration.py for reuse by [191], [193], [194]. CLAIM SCOPE (per Kochenderfer, 2026, §7.1): the general validation formalism specializes cleanly to QA finite-state systems where the denominator/normalizing constant becomes an exact finite count rather than an estimated integral; we do NOT claim global superiority over Kochenderfer. Sources: (Kochenderfer, 2026) Algorithms for Validation, MIT Press CC-BY-NC-ND (val.pdf, 441pp; docs/theory/kochenderfer_validation_excerpts.md anchor val-7-1-direct-estimation-pfail); (Sole, 2026) cognition spaces arxiv:2601.12837 via cert [194]; (Dale, 2026) qa_cognition_space_morphospace_cert_v1; authored Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-27.
